faq.desc.content: Our phone support is available 24/7. Our Telegram chat is available from 9AM to 10PM local time.
response.time: How quickly can customers expect a response?
response.time.desc: Phone calls are answered immediately. Telegram messages are typically responded to within minutes during operating hours.
languages.support: Do we offer support in multiple languages?
languages.support.desc: Yes, we offer support in English, Spanish, French, and German across all our support channels.
contact.info: What information should customers provide when contacting support?
contact.info.desc: To help us assist them more efficiently, customers should provide their full name, account information (if applicable), a detailed description of their issue, and any relevant screenshots or error messages.

platforms.desc.one inst: To set up Telegram integration, you need to create a bot using BotFather and obtain a bot token.
platforms.desc.two: Create a web presence with either a subdomain on our platform or your own custom domain.
platforms.desc.two inst: Choose between using our subdomain (yourname.ourplatform.com) or setting up your own custom domain.

telegram.instructions.notes.title: Important Notes
telegram.instructions.notes: Keep your bot token secure - it provides full access to your bot
You can change bot settings via BotFather at any time
Customers can find your bot by its username

setup.sub: Your website will be available at: yourstore.ourplatform.com
notes.sub: Quick setup with no technical configuration
setup.custom: Purchase a domain from a domain registrar (e.g., GoDaddy, Namecheap)
Configure your domain's DNS settings with your registrar:
Add a CNAME record for "www" pointing to proxy.ourplatform.com
Add an A record for the root domain pointing to our IP: 123.45.67.89
DNS changes may take 24-48 hours to propagate
We'll automatically issue an SSL certificate once DNS is verified
notes.custom: Professional branding with your own domain
Better for long-term SEO and brand recognition
